member.name: M:Core.API.Controllers.InvestmentCasesController.UploadPreliminaryContract(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy alias for documents/confirm when the file is already in storage. Prefer presign + PUT + confirm.

member.name: M:Core.API.Controllers.InvestmentCasesController.UploadSignedContract(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy alias for documents/confirm when the file is already in storage. Prefer presign + PUT + confirm.

member.name: M:Core.API.Controllers.InvestmentCasesController.Confirm(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers the object in DB after client PUT to presigned URL; advances workflow for contract document types when status allows.

member.name: M:Core.API.Http.ApiControllerBase.ReadTransitionRequestAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads optional JSON body; empty POST without Content-Type is treated as default.

member.summary: Enriches OpenAPI tag descriptions shown in Swagger UI grouping.
